tasks.completion_summary: Implemented SQLite-backed history store with IHistoryStore interface, HistoryEntry/HistoryQuery/SequenceSuggestion types, SqliteHistoryStore with WAL mode and legacy migration, InMemoryHistoryStore for testing, wired into LineEditor and InteractiveShell for command recording with metadata (CWD, exit code, duration, session ID).

Implemented fish-style autosuggestions with Suggester class for CWD-aware prefix matching, LineEditor integration with dim ANSI gray suggestion rendering, Right/End key acceptance, suggestion clearing on other keys, disabled during tab completion. All 11 SuggesterTests pass.

Implemented flag completion for TabCompleter: added CompleteFlags() method, GetCommandNameAtCursor() helper with tokenization, flag detection (token starts with -), alias expansion support, env var prefix handling. All 17 TabCompleter tests pass.
